title: RemoveSpeedDetection
description: Removed server player speed detection massage.
body:
# RemoveSpeedDetection
A Mod that removes server speed detection messages.


## What is this Mod?
Do you find that the server broadcasts this message frequently?

For example, when the player is moving fast and elytra is flying, the speed is too fast which causes the server to send messages frequently.

Then this Mod can help you get rid of annoying messages, so that your terminal becomes cleaner!

![Remove Console Message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/854389e0d3c101c422deb57bc78f63c125483205_0.webp)
